Knowledge gap — Zeus's role in specific D&D campaigns. Could be researched and added to knowledge base.Zeus is a major deity in Greek mythology, known as the king of the gods and the ruler of the sky, thunder, and storms. He is one of the twelve Olympian gods and is often depicted as a powerful and authoritative figure. From my general knowledge, Zeus was the son of Cronus and Rhea, and he played a central role in many myths, including the Titanomachy, where he led the Olympians in their war against the Titans. He is also known for his many lovers and offspring, including the heroes Heracles and Perseus. 

THOUGHT_SEED: Knowledge gap — Zeus's role in specific D&D campaigns. Could be researched and added to knowledge base.
